sentences.sentence: Safety goggles are stored near the sink.
sentences.phonetic_focus: clear word-final consonants

sentences.sentence: Emergency showers are located by the exit.
sentences.phonetic_focus: basic vowel distinctions

sentences.sentence: Wash your hands before leaving.
sentences.phonetic_focus: clear word-final consonants

sentences.sentence: Chemical spills must be reported to the front desk immediately.
sentences.phonetic_focus: consonant clusters (-lls, -nts) and front desk compound stress

sentences.sentence: The fire blanket can be found on the back wall.
sentences.phonetic_focus: compound noun stress (fire blanket) and linking can_be

sentences.sentence: Protective gloves and lab coats are provided at the storage cabinet.
sentences.phonetic_focus: compound noun stress (storage cabinet) and consonant clusters (-cts)

sentences.sentence: If you are unsure where to find an item, check the safety chart posted near the main entrance.
sentences.structure: fronted conditional clause with wayfinding pointer
sentences.phonetic_focus: linked speech across clause boundaries (if you_are) and final consonant clusters at phrase boundaries

sentences.sentence: Glass containers go in the blue bins.
sentences.phonetic_focus: clear word-final consonants and basic vowel distinctions

sentences.sentence: Paper and cardboard are collected at the loading dock.
sentences.phonetic_focus: compound noun stress (loading dock) and linking are_collected

sentences.sentence: Our staff members sort plastics by their resin codes.
sentences.phonetic_focus: consonant clusters (-sts in plastics) and staff members compound stress

sentences.sentence: Compost bins are emptied twice each week by our crew.
sentences.phonetic_focus: consonant clusters (-mps in compost) and reduced function words by our

sentences.sentence: You can drop off old electronics at the front counter.
sentences.phonetic_focus: compound noun stress (front counter) and consonant clusters (-cts in electronics)

sentences.sentence: Metal cans and aluminum foil belong in the gray container.
sentences.phonetic_focus: reduced syllables (aluminum) and linking cans_and

sentences.sentence: If you are not sure which bin to use, please check the sorting guide mounted beside the main gate.
sentences.structure: fronted conditional clause with wayfinding pointer
sentences.phonetic_focus: reduced function words in rapid sequences (which bin to use) and linked speech across clause boundaries

sentences.sentence: First, tape your paper down.
sentences.phonetic_focus: clear word-final consonants (tape, down)

sentences.sentence: Next, wet your brush.
sentences.phonetic_focus: clear word-final consonants (wet, brush)

sentences.sentence: Then, pick a light color.
sentences.phonetic_focus: basic vowel distinctions (light, color)

sentences.sentence: Spread the paint across the sky in smooth strokes.
sentences.phonetic_focus: consonant clusters (str- in strokes, spread) and linking paint_across

sentences.sentence: Blend two colors gently while the surface stays damp.
sentences.phonetic_focus: consonant clusters (-nd in blend, -ys in stays) and reduced syllables (gently)

sentences.sentence: Add darker shades once the first layer has dried completely.
sentences.phonetic_focus: reduced syllables (completely) and consonant clusters (-rst in first)

sentences.sentence: Lastly, clean your brushes with fresh water and lay your painting flat to dry overnight.
sentences.phonetic_focus: stress-timing across a long sentence and linked speech (flat to dry) with reduced function words
